# Curfew Festival 2026

> Non-profit open-air house music festival in Ghent, Belgium.

## Key Facts
- Date: Saturday 6 June 2026
- Location: Sport Vlaanderen, Blaarmeersen, Ghent, Belgium
- Type: Daytime open-air house music festival
- Organizer: Curfew (VZW Lada), non-profit
- Founded: 2015
- History: 10+ years, 100+ events, 40,000+ people
- Tagline: In House We Trust
- Website: https://curfew.events
- Tickets: https://www.tiqs.com/alfred/events/shop/4789
- Email: info@curfew.events
- Instagram: @curfew.events

## Final Timetable 2026

### Main
- 12:00 - 13:30: Borat (Music Mania)
- 13:30 - 15:00: Sharon Deman
- 15:00 - 16:30: Fonkituur
- 16:30 - 18:00: Walashi
- 18:00 - 20:00: Red D x Jensen
- 20:00 - 21:30: Deejames
- 21:30 - 23:00: Ian Pooley LIVE
- 23:00 - 00:30: Pabels b2b Signo
- 00:30 - 02:00: No Shit Like Deep

### Hide Out
- 16:00 - 18:00: Rik P & Kingfluencer
- 18:00 - 20:00: Rakesh
- 20:00 - 22:00: René Opsedée
- 22:00 - 00:30: No Sleep Richy
- 00:30 - 02:00: Fred Blunt

## Ticket Prices
- Pre-Release: €20 (sold out)
- Early Birds: €25 (sold out)
- Wave 1: €30 (last tickets now)
- Wave 2: €35
- Final Wave: €40
- Door Sale: €45

## About
Curfew started in 2015 with a simple idea: create a space where house music feels like home. A group of friends in Ghent, Belgium, who believed the dancefloor could be something more than a night out — it could be a community. Every event goes back into the music, the people, and the experience. No investors, no corporate agenda.

## Upcoming Events
- Club Curfew invites The Rekord Klub: Saturday 16 May 2026 at Sint-Jacobsnieuwstraat 30, Ghent. Wide Open afterhours, Deejames b2b Deejames, vinyl only, 10 hours and more. Tickets: https://www.tiqs.com/alfred/events/shop/5547
- Curfew Festival 2026: Saturday 6 June 2026 at Sport Vlaanderen, Blaarmeersen, Ghent. Final timetable across Main and Hide Out with Borat, Sharon Deman, Fonkituur, Walashi, Red D x Jensen, Deejames, Ian Pooley LIVE, Pabels b2b Signo, No Shit Like Deep, Rik P & Kingfluencer, Rakesh, René Opsedée, No Sleep Richy, and Fred Blunt. Tickets: https://www.tiqs.com/alfred/events/shop/4789
- Club Curfew - Gentse Feesten: Friday 17 July to Sunday 26 July 2026 at Sint-Jacobsnieuwstraat, Ghent. 10 Days Off, lineup TBA.
- Curfew x Push It Open Air: Saturday 25 September 2026, secret location in Ghent. Lineup TBA.
- Curfew x TBA: Saturday 31 October 2026, secret location in Ghent. Birthday of a very special label in house music, lineup TBA.
- Curfew x Mo'Juice: Saturday 7 November 2026 at Club Wintercircus, Ghent. Kamma & Masalo, Forbidden Fruit, Nico Juice & Mo'Disko.
